objective: The aim of this experiment is to study the fundamental architecture of Database Management Systems and set up a working database environment for executing subsequent laboratory experiments.
learningObjectives: Understand the Three-Schema Architecture of a DBMS
Differentiate between Internal, Conceptual, and External levels
Install and configure a relational database management system
Connect to the database using command-line and graphical interfaces
expectedOutcomes: Ability to describe the components of a DBMS
Successful setup of a database environment
Ability to connect and interact with a database engine
